returns cached information whether the mesh is closed Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.isMeshClosed.

returns cached bounding box of this mesh object in world coordinates; if you need bounding box in local coordinates please call getBoundingBox() Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.getWorldBox. Parameter _1 defaults to {}.
returns cached information about the number of selected faces in the mesh Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.numSelectedFaces.
returns cached information about the number of selected undirected edges in the mesh Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.numSelectedEdges.
returns cached information about the number of crease undirected edges in the mesh Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.numCreaseEdges.
returns cached summed area of mesh triangles Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.totalArea.
returns cached area of selected triangles Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.selectedArea.
returns cached volume of space surrounded by the mesh, which is valid only if mesh is closed Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.volume.
returns cached average edge length Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.avgEdgeLen.
returns cached information about the number of undirected edges in the mesh Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.numUndirectedEdges.
returns cached information about the number of holes in the mesh Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.numHoles.
returns cached information about the number of components in the mesh Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.numComponents.
returns cached information about the number of handles in the mesh Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.numHandles.
returns the amount of memory this object occupies on heap Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.heapBytes.
returns overriden file extension used to serialize mesh inside this object, nullptr means defaultSerializeMeshFormat() Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.serializeFormat.

returns overriden file extension used to serialize mesh inside this object if set, or defaultSerializeMeshFormat().c_str() otherwise; never returns nullptr Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.actualSerializeFormat.

Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.sameModels.

Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.classNameInPlural.
returns true if the property is set at least in one viewport specified by the mask Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.getVisualizeProperty.
returns all viewports where this object or any of its parents is clipped by plane Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.globalClippedByPlaneMask.

returns true if this object or any of its parents is clipped by plane in any of given viewports Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.globalClippedByPlane. Parameter viewportMask defaults to ViewportMask.any().

returns color of object when it is selected/not-selected (depending on argument) in given viewport Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.getFrontColor. Parameter selected defaults to true. Parameter viewportId defaults to {}.

returns color of object when it is selected/not-selected (depending on argument) in all viewports Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.getFrontColorsForAllViewports. Parameter selected defaults to true.
returns backward color of object in all viewports Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.getBackColorsForAllViewports.
returns backward color of object in given viewport Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.getBackColor. Parameter viewportId defaults to {}.
returns global transparency alpha of object in given viewport Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.getGlobalAlpha. Parameter viewportId defaults to {}.
returns global transparency alpha of object in all viewports Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.getGlobalAlphaForAllViewports.
returns current dirty flags for the object Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.getDirtyFlags.
resets all dirty flags (except for cache flags that will be reset automatically on cache update) Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.resetDirty.
reset dirty flags without some specific bits (useful for lazy normals update) Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.resetDirtyExceptMask.
returns cached bounding box of this object in local coordinates Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.getBoundingBox.
whether the object can be picked (by mouse) in any of given viewports Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.isPickable. Parameter viewportMask defaults to ViewportMask.any().
returns the current coloring mode of the object Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.getColoringType.
returns the current shininess visual value Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.getShininess.
returns intensity of reflections Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.getSpecularStrength.
returns intensity of non-directional light Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.getAmbientStrength.
draws this object for visualization Returns true if something was drawn. Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.render.
draws this object for picking Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.renderForPicker.
draws this object for 2d UI Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.renderUi.
return several info lines that can better describe the object in the UI Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.getInfoLines.

whether the scene-related properties should get their values from SceneColors and SceneSettings instances rather than from the input data on deserialization Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.useDefaultScenePropertiesOnDeserialization.
Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.name.
this space to parent space transformation (to world space if no parent) for default or given viewport

parameterdescription.para: receives true if the object has default transformation in this viewport (same as xf() returns) Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.xf. Parameter id defaults to {}.

briefdescription.para: returns xfs for all viewports, combined into a single object Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.xfsForAllViewports.
this space to world space transformation for default or specific viewport

parameterdescription.para: receives true if the object has default transformation in this viewport (same as worldXf() returns) Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.worldXf. Parameter id defaults to {}.

briefdescription.para: returns all viewports where this object is visible together with all its parents Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.globalVisibilityMask.

returns true if this object is visible together with all its parents in any of given viewports Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.globalVisibility. Parameter viewportMask defaults to ViewportMask.any().
object properties lock for UI Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.isLocked.
If true, the scene tree GUI doesn't allow you to drag'n'drop this object into a different parent. Defaults to false. Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.isParentLocked.
return true if given object is ancestor of this one, false otherwise Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.isAncestor.
Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.isSelected.
Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.isAncillary.
returns true if the object or any of its ancestors are ancillary Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.isGlobalAncillary.

checks whether the object is visible in any of the viewports specified by the mask (by default in any viewport) Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.isVisible. Parameter viewportMask defaults to ViewportMask.any().
gets object visibility as bitmask of viewports Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.visibilityMask.
Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.resetRedrawFlag.
clones all tree of this object (except ancillary and unrecognized children) Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.cloneTree.
clones all tree of this object (except ancillary and unrecognied children) clones only pointers to mesh, points or voxels Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.shallowCloneTree.

empty box returns bounding box of this object and all children visible in given (or default) viewport in world coordinates Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.getWorldTreeBox. Parameter _1 defaults to {}.
provides read-only access to the tag storage the storage is a set of unique strings Generated from method MR.ObjectMeshHolder.tags.

an object that stores a mesh Generated from class MR.ObjectMeshHolder. Base classes: Direct: (non-virtual) MR.VisualObject Indirect: (non-virtual) MR.ObjectChildrenHolder MR.Object Derived classes: Direct: (non-virtual) MR.ObjectDistanceMap MR.ObjectMesh MR.ObjectVoxels This is the const half of the class.
